_provenance: MACHINE-CAPTURED 2026-07-17 via edgartools==5.42.0, edgar.Company('AAPL').get_filings(form="10-K") / get_filings(form="10-Q"); accession/filing_date/period_of_report dumped exactly as returned, never hand-typed. AAPL's FYE is 2025-09-27 (September) -- a NON-DECEMBER fiscal year end. FY2025's Q1 period_of_report (2024-12-28) falls in CALENDAR year 2024, one year off from its FISCAL year (2025). This is exactly the case that exposed the calendar-vs-fiscal quarterly-coverage grouping bug (Task 10 revision round 1, reviewer's live probe on AAPL/NVDA). Capture command: `edgar.set_identity(...); c = edgar.Company('AAPL'); sorted(c.get_filings(form='10-K'), key=lambda f: f.filing_date, reverse=True)[:1]` and the analogous `form='10-Q'` call, reading `.accession_no / .filing_date / .period_of_report` off each real Filing.
